mysql: Create table If Not Exists Project (project_id int, employee_id int)
Create table If Not Exists Employee (employee_id int, name varchar(10), experience_years int)
mssql: Create table Project (project_id int, employee_id int)
Create table Employee (employee_id int, name varchar(10), experience_years int)
oraclesql: Create table Project (project_id int, employee_id int)
Create table Employee (employee_id int, name varchar(10), experience_years int)
metaData.name: project_employees_ii

discussion_posts.name: Negmat
discussion_posts.content:
'''
SELECT TOP 1 WITH TIES project_id
FROM Project
GROUP BY project_id
ORDER BY COUNT(employee_id) DESC
'''

discussion_posts.name: rams110071
discussion_posts.content:
with temp as (
select project_id, count(*) as cnt
from project
group by project_id)


select project_id
from temp
where cnt= (select max(cnt) from temp)

discussion_posts.name: mcgaritym
discussion_posts.content:
'''
with count_employees_projects AS
(SELECT project_id, count(employee_id) AS count_
FROM Project
GROUP BY project_id
ORDER BY count(employee_id) DESC)

SELECT project_id 
FROM count_employees_projects
WHERE count_ = 
(SELECT MAX(count_) FROM count_employees_projects);
'''

discussion_posts.name: rajashreekumkar
discussion_posts.content:
with test as (select a.project_id, count(b.employee_id) as c
from Project a join Employee b on a.employee_id =b.employee_id 
group by a.project_id  
order by count(b.employee_id) desc) 

select project_id
from test
where c= (select max(c) from test)

discussion_posts.name: pejato
discussion_posts.content: Can PostgreSQL support be added to this question please?

discussion_posts.name: vimitw
discussion_posts.content:
with cte as 
(
select 
project_id, count(distinct employee_id) as cn
from project 
group by 1 
)
select project_id
from cte 
where cn= (select max(cn)from cte)

discussion_posts.name: leetmaboshi
discussion_posts.content:
with c as(
select project_id, count(employee_id) as n
from Project
group by project_id)

select project_id from (
select project_id, dense_rank() over (order by n desc) as m
from c) d
where m=1

discussion_posts.name: talent2817
discussion_posts.content:
with cte as (select p.project_id ,count(distinct (employee_id)) as Counting
from project p
group by p.project_id
order by counting DESC)
select cte.project_id from cte
limit 1

discussion_posts.name: asusundevilmsba2020
discussion_posts.content:
'''
select project_id  from  
(select project_id, count(*) cnt, dense_rank() over(order by count(*) desc) rnk  from project group by project_id )a where rnk =1 
'''

discussion_posts.name: ankitgadawe
discussion_posts.content:
with t1 as(
select project_id, count(distinct employee_id) cnt
from project 
group by project_id
)
select project_id from t1 where cnt= (select max(cnt) from t1)
